SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into on the 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

Dr. Emily Tan (NRIC No.: S9876543B), residing at 123 Serangoon Road, Singapore 123456, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: emily.tan@fictionalmail.sg,

and

Quantum Ventures Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456B), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 789 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890.

WHEREAS, Dr. Emily Tan desires to sell, and Quantum Ventures Pte. Ltd. desires to purchase, 10,000 shares in Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. for the aggregate purchase price of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
